manifest.description: Show the public PIMA MCP endpoint manifest for Buck Mason.

recommend.description: Ask PIMA for a Buck Mason capsule recommendation.

auth:login.description: Authorize this agent with a Buck Mason customer account via PIMA email magic link.

agent-name.description: Name shown to the customer on the authorization screen
agent-name.name: agent-name

no-open.description: Do not try to open any browser URL
no-open.name: no-open

auth:logout.description: Delete the stored Buck Mason customer-agent authorization.

auth:status.description: Show the stored Buck Mason customer-agent authorization.

cart:build.description: Build a stateless Buck Mason Shopify cart permalink from products and sizes.

item.description: Cart item as product-id-or-code:size[:qty]. Repeat for multiple items.
item.name: item

allow-pickup-partial.description: Allow cart even when not every item is available for pickup
allow-pickup-partial.name: allow-pickup-partial

locations:list.description: List Buck Mason stores and warehouses exposed to the MCP catalog.

checkout:charge.description: Complete MPP checkout with a customer-approved Stripe Shared Payment Token.

body.description: JSON file containing the full MPP checkout body
body.name: body

line-item.description: Line item as sku[:qty[:pickup-location-slug]]. Repeat for multiple items.
line-item.name: line-item

credit.description: Customer credit code. Repeat for multiple codes.
credit.name: credit

spt.description: Stripe Shared Payment Token returned by link-cli
spt.name: spt

acknowledged-total-cents.description: Total cents read back to and approved by the customer
acknowledged-total-cents.name: acknowledged-total-cents

dry-run.description: Pass dry_run=true to the checkout endpoint
dry-run.name: dry-run

confirm.description: Required to submit the charge request
confirm.name: confirm

line-item.description: Line item as sku[:qty[:pickup-location-slug]]. Repeat for multiple items.
line-item.name: line-item

credit.description: Customer credit code. Repeat for multiple codes.

open.description: Open the hosted checkout URL in the default browser

checkout:mpp.description: Preview, request Link approval, and complete an MPP checkout.

body.description: JSON file containing the full MPP checkout body
body.name: body

line-item.description: Line item as sku[:qty[:pickup-location-slug]]. Repeat for multiple items.
line-item.name: line-item

credit.description: Customer credit code. Repeat for multiple codes.
credit.name: credit

payment-method-id.description: Link payment method ID from `link-cli payment-methods list`
payment-method-id.name: payment-method-id

acknowledged-total-cents.description: Optional guardrail total cents; must match the preview charge total

dry-run.name: dry-run

confirm.description: Required after reading the total to the customer and before requesting Link approval

json.description: Print full response JSON without exposing the shared payment token

credit.name: credit

dry-run.description: Pass dry_run=true to the checkout endpoint
dry-run.name: dry-run

checkout:status.description: Poll a PIMA-hosted checkout for completion, cancellation, expiration, or failure.

watch.description: Poll until the checkout reaches a terminal status
watch.name: watch

categories:list.description: List Buck Mason category taxonomy from the public PIMA MCP API.

lookbook:build.description: Build an HTML Buck Mason lookbook from config and picks JSON.

look-images.description: Directory containing premium try-on images named look1.png, look2.png, ...
look-images.name: look-images

no-tryon.description: Build editorial tier from product imagery instead of generated try-on images
no-tryon.name: no-tryon

lookbook:deploy.description: Prepare and deploy a built lookbook to Cloudflare Pages via wrangler. Voting is on by default.

kv-id.description: Cloudflare KV namespace id for legacy LOOKBOOK_VOTES import. Defaults to an existing or newly created LOOKBOOK_VOTES namespace.
kv-id.name: kv-id

lookbook-id.description: Override lookbook id for voting storage
lookbook-id.name: lookbook-id

no-voting.description: Deploy read-only static lookbook without voting functions
no-voting.name: no-voting

no-overwrite.description: Refuse to deploy if the Pages project already has deployments
no-overwrite.name: no-overwrite

dry-run.description: Prepare files and validate, but do not deploy
dry-run.name: dry-run

lookbook:discover-candidates.description: Discover weekly lookbook candidates from recent Buck Mason catalog items.

sizes.description: JSON file or inline JSON, for example {"shirt":"L","pant":"31"}
sizes.name: sizes

lookbook:generate-images.description: Explicitly run gpt-image-2 image edits for a prepared premium lookbook image plan.

plan.description: Image plan JSON from lookbook image-plan
plan.name: plan

concurrency.description: Concurrent image edit calls; defaults to number of looks
concurrency.name: concurrency

api-key-env.description: Env var containing the OpenAI key
api-key-env.name: api-key-env

dry-run.description: Write prompt files and marker without calling OpenAI
dry-run.name: dry-run

lookbook:hosting.description: Show recommended ways to host a built HTML lookbook.

lookbook:image-plan.description: Build deterministic gpt-image-2 prompts and input ordering for premium lookbook try-on images.

profile.description: Customer profile.md with reference photos and build/face facts
profile.name: profile

out.description: Write image plan JSON to this path
out.name: out

lookbook:profile.description: Parse a Buck Mason stylist profile.md into structured JSON.

lookbook:rank-votes.description: Rank a voting-enabled lookbook and emit a checkout handoff.

votes.description: Path or URL to votes JSON
votes.name: votes

no-look-backed.description: Only recommend items with positive item votes
no-look-backed.name: no-look-backed

handoff-out.description: Write handoff text to this path
handoff-out.name: handoff-out

lookbook:run.description: Run the headless lookbook pipeline through discover, premium image checkpoint, build, and local validation.

resume-build.description: Resume after premium images have been generated
resume-build.name: resume-build

lookbook:score-event.description: Score a calendar event for lookbook suitability.

file.description: JSON event file. Reads stdin when omitted.
file.name: file

lookbook:settings.description: Fetch curated lookbook settings and image-generation prompt guidance from PIMA.

plan.name: plan

person.description: Person preset name under --people-dir, overriding plan.person
person.name: person

project.description: Cloudflare Pages project name. Defaults to plan.project or buckmason-<lookbook-id>.
project.name: project

no-tryon.description: Build editorial product-image tier instead of premium generated try-on images
no-tryon.name: no-tryon

generate-images.description: Call gpt-image-2 for missing premium look images
generate-images.name: generate-images

concurrency.description: Concurrent premium image edit calls; defaults to number of looks
concurrency.name: concurrency

api-key-env.description: Env var containing the OpenAI key
api-key-env.name: api-key-env

deploy.description: Deploy to Cloudflare Pages with Wrangler after local validation
deploy.name: deploy

dry-run.description: Prepare deploy files but do not publish to Cloudflare Pages
dry-run.name: dry-run

kv-id.description: Cloudflare KV namespace id for legacy LOOKBOOK_VOTES import
kv-id.name: kv-id

no-voting.description: Deploy read-only static lookbook without voting functions
no-voting.name: no-voting

no-overwrite.description: Refuse to deploy if the Pages project already has deployments
no-overwrite.name: no-overwrite

no-smoke.description: Skip post-deploy page, manifest, voting, and OG smoke checks
no-smoke.name: no-smoke
